title: calobota elongata
intro: Calobota elongata is a plant species, also known as the "Karee Apple", belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities that can help protect against cell damage and infections. Calobota elongata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
